features.description: Extend AppSettings interface to include ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch. Add TTS settings to GET /api/settings response. Add TTS settings to PUT /api/settings endpoint. Validate TTS settings (voice from curated list, rate -50% to +100%, pitch -50Hz to +50Hz).
preconditions: TTS service exists at backend/services/tts.ts with synthesize() accepting voice/rate/pitch options
Settings service exists at backend/services/settings.ts with getSettings() and updateSettings()
Settings API routes exist at backend/routes/settings.ts with GET and PUT endpoints
expectedBehavior: AppSettings interface includes ttsVoice (string), ttsRate (string), ttsPitch (string)
GET /api/settings returns { ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch } in response
PUT /api/settings accepts { ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch } and persists them
Validation: voice must be one of 6 curated voices, rate must be -50% to +100%, pitch must be -50Hz to +50Hz
Invalid TTS settings return 400 with descriptive error
verificationSteps: npm run test -- --grep 'tts' (expect tests for TTS settings)
curl GET /api/settings shows ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch
curl PUT /api/settings with valid TTS settings returns 200
curl PUT /api/settings with invalid voice returns 400

features.description: Add TTS settings section to Settings page. Voice dropdown with 6 curated voices (en-US-GuyNeural, en-US-ChristopherNeural, en-US-BrianNeural, en-GB-ThomasNeural, en-US-JennyNeural, en-US-MichelleNeural). Rate slider (-50% to +100%, default +25%). Pitch slider (-50Hz to +50Hz, default +0Hz). Save changes via PUT /api/settings. Show current settings on page load.
expectedBehavior: New 'Voice Output' section appears in Settings page below AI Model Selection
Voice dropdown shows 6 curated voices with en-US-GuyNeural selected by default
Rate slider shows -50% to +100% range with current value displayed
Pitch slider shows -50Hz to +50Hz range with current value displayed
Changing any setting triggers PUT /api/settings and shows success toast
Settings persist after page refresh (GET /api/settings on mount)
verificationSteps: npm run typecheck (expect no errors)
Manual: Navigate to Settings, verify TTS section exists with all 3 controls
Manual: Change voice, verify toast shows success
Manual: Refresh page, verify settings are preserved

features.description: Connect TTS settings to VoiceControls. Modify voiceAPI.synthesize() to use saved TTS voice/rate/pitch from settings instead of defaults. Fetch TTS settings on app load and cache them. Pass voice/rate/pitch to synthesize() call in VoiceControls.
preconditions: VoiceControls.tsx calls voiceAPI.synthesize({ text }) without voice/rate/pitch
expectedBehavior: On app load, fetch TTS settings from GET /api/settings
Cache TTS settings (voice, rate, pitch) in a module-level variable or Zustand store
VoiceControls.speak() calls voiceAPI.synthesize() with cached voice/rate/pitch
Meditation session voice playback uses the saved TTS voice settings
verificationSteps: npm run typecheck (expect no errors)
Manual: Set voice to en-US-ChristopherNeural in Settings
Manual: Start meditation, enable voice output, verify different voice is used

features.description: Add STT model settings to backend. Add sttModel field to AppSettings. Add GET /api/settings/stt-models endpoint that lists available sherpa-onnx models from servers/stt/ directory with their sizes. Add POST /api/settings/stt-reload endpoint that hot-reloads the STT model (destroys old recognizer, creates new one with specified model).
preconditions: STT service exists at backend/services/stt.ts with SttService class
Sherpa-onnx server at servers/stt/server.mjs loads model at startup
expectedBehavior: GET /api/settings/stt-models returns [{ name, path, sizeMB, memoryMB }] for each model in servers/stt/
POST /api/settings/stt-reload accepts { modelDir } and triggers model hot-reload
Hot-reload stops current recognizer, creates new one with specified model
Returns 200 on success, 400 if model not found, 500 if reload fails
STT server /health endpoint continues to return 200 during/after reload
verificationSteps: npm run test -- --grep 'stt' (expect tests for STT model endpoints)
curl GET /api/settings/stt-models returns list of available models
curl POST /api/settings/stt-reload with valid model returns 200
curl http://localhost:8765/health returns 200 after reload

features.description: Add STT settings section to Settings page. Model dropdown listing available sherpa-onnx models with size info. Warning message when switching to larger model. 'Reload Model' button triggers POST /api/settings/stt-reload. Loading indicator during reload. Error toast if reload fails.
preconditions: Settings API client exists with getSettings() method
STT models endpoint exists at GET /api/settings/stt-models
expectedBehavior: New 'Speech Recognition (STT)' section appears in Settings page
Model dropdown shows available models with size (e.g., 'whisper-tiny.en (~40MB)')
Warning banner appears when selected model is larger than current
Reload Model button triggers POST /api/settings/stt-reload
Loading spinner shows while model is reloading (2-5 seconds)
Success toast on completion, error toast on failure
Previous model remains active if reload fails
verificationSteps: npm run typecheck (expect no errors)
Manual: Navigate to Settings, verify STT section exists
Manual: Select different model, verify warning appears for larger models
Manual: Click Reload, verify loading indicator, verify success

features.description: Ensure voice input uses the currently loaded STT model. After STT model reload completes, voice input in VoiceControls should use the new model for transcription. The voiceInputManager calls voiceAPI.transcribe() which proxies to the STT service.
preconditions: VoiceControls.tsx calls voiceAPI.transcribe() for voice input
STT service proxies to sherpa-onnx server on port 8765
expectedBehavior: Voice input in meditation session uses the active STT model
After model reload, new transcriptions use the reloaded model
If reload is in progress, transcription requests wait or return appropriate error
verificationSteps: Manual: Reload STT model in Settings to a different one
Manual: Start meditation, use voice input, verify transcription works with new model
